# Next Thread Handoff — Co Pilot Security v3.0.63

Latest build: v3.0.63 REPORT ARCHIVE COMMAND CENTER

## What changed
- Built from v3.0.62.
- Rebuilt Dispatch/Admin Report Archive page based on the generated code blueprint.
- Added KPIs, search, filters, archive table, selected report detail rail, preview card, media counts, view/download/share/delete actions, CSV export, pagination, rows per page, and clear filters.
- Report Archive combines:
  - state.patrolReports
  - local Report Builder drafts/published records
  - completed patrol requests as draft-ready archive rows
- Preserved v3.0.62 guardDisplayName fix and all previous command-center pages.
- No new SQL required.
